title: task
description: schc.c:485 - When bitmap_bits==63, the condition 'bitmap_bits < 63' is false, so the bitmap masking is skipped. But 8 bytes of input are read, potentially setting bit 63 from untrusted input. Failure scenario: malformed ACK with high bit set in bitmap bytes causes incorrect retransmit behavior in ACK-on-error mode. Fix: change condition to 'bitmap_bits < 64'.
